title: Bombay lawyers do not know how good they are: Senior Advocate Zal Andhyarujina
description: Step into one of the oldest chambers in Bombay and you half-expect the antiquities to greet you. While the office carries that familiar old-world charm, it is deliberately modern. Walk further in, and one can find Senior Advocate Zal Andhyarujina at a desk lined with screens and remarkably little paper. Two cats hold quiet court nearby.Andhyarujina was designated in 2020. His practice spans commercial litigation, international arbitration, banking and insolvency. He is a door tenant at Foun
